profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Futura Energi Global Tbk provides construction support services in Indonesia. It operates through Trading and Construction Support Services, Advertising and Consulting, Data Services, Product Development, and Creative Warehouse segments. The company offers oil and gas services to the offshore and onshore oil and gas sectors; renewable energy solutions, such as micro hydropower generators and turbine servicing; and manpower and logistics supply services. It also provides digital media and advertising services comprising data services consisting of data engineering and visualization, data warehouse management services, data storytelling, applied research, predictive analytics, data protection and risk detection, incident response management, and threat mitigation and reporting; creative services, including branding and identity, campaign KVs, animation/video, 2D and 3D output, content creation, social media, and UI/UX; and technology services, such as web and app optimization and custom builds. In addition, the company engages in data processing, information and communication, professional, scientific, technical, installation, engineering, construction, maintenance, trading, and chemical material and goods activities. Further, it supplies mechanical and electrical products and services. The company was formerly known as PT Lini Imaji Kreasi Ekosistem Tbk and changed its name to PT Futura Energi Global Tbk in February 2025. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
